item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pendapat mereka bahwa pernyataan tersebut terlalu satu sisi.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that collective interests are often prioritized over individual rights in Indonesia, then visibly adopts Agent B's one-sided/balance critique at turn 3 and ends with a balance-and-reform position. Agent B consistently argues that collective or development priorities need stronger individual-rights safeguards, with only limited movement from balance toward a more structural-rights critique. Agent A's Indonesian is readable despite the mixed-case opener.
